underlying_goal: Deploy a public-facing OmegA web application with voice-to-voice interface from the canonical GitHub repo, including porting the Python 4-layer stack to TypeScript for the Next.js frontend
friction_detail: Vercel MCP lacked a delete project tool, requiring manual user action.
brief_summary: User wanted to clean-deploy OmegA as a public web app with voice interface; Claude audited Vercel, discovered an existing substantial web app, and began porting the 4-layer Python stack to TypeScript before hitting the usage limit.
